project_name: 面向听觉障碍人群的语音识别康复系统
target: 完成可供小程序调用的后端 MVP，并保留语料处理、音频生成、用户训练记录、API 文档。
state_notes: T06 completed; next phase planned for local frontend demo and full frontend/backend integration. See docs/NEXT_PHASE_PLAN.md and tasks T07-T10.
global_constraints: 不要提交 API Key 或真实用户数据
先做小样本 smoke test，再决定是否租 GPU
后端 API 使用 /api/v1 前缀
每个任务完成后必须更新本文件和 .codex/logs/Txx_result.md
每次改动后至少运行 py_compile 或对应 pytest

known_risks.description: T01 已移除 llm_augment.py 中的硬编码 API Key；用户已撤销旧 key。后续仍需避免提交 .env 或真实密钥。
语料处理未全量跑通，BERT/LTP/GPT 调用耗时和失败率未知。
缺少用户、会话、答题、进度数据结构，小程序接入后无法保存训练记录。
当基础 profile/fade/RMS 已完成，主观听感留给 T06 评估；如果过于不自然，可能需要调整参数或增加更复杂的处理（如频域滤波）。

acceptance: 列出可编译性、接口、数据库、语料、音频、安全风险
tests_run: python -m py_compile data_pipeline/*.py server/*.py (failed in PowerShell because wildcard was not expanded)

pip install -r requirements.txt (failed in default sandbox due network access; passed after escalation)
python -c "import server.main; print('server.main import ok')" (failed before dependency install; passed after installing edge-tts)
Python sqlite3 schema inspection for capd_database.db

secret scan with rg excluding .env, .codex/logs, raw_data, binary audio, and pyc files (passed: no hardcoded secrets found)
python -m compileall -q data_pipeline server (passed)
python -c "import server.main; print('server import ok')" (passed)
bash -lc "python -m py_compile data_pipeline/*.py server/*.py" (failed: Windows denied Bash/WSL instance creation)
python -m py_compile data_pipeline/*.py server/*.py (failed in PowerShell because wildcard was not expanded)
Get-ChildItem -Path data_pipeline,server -Filter *.py | ForEach-Object { python -m py_compile $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } } (passed)
python -m uvicorn server.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8011 (short smoke passed)
python -m uvicorn server.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8012 (short smoke passed)

python -c "from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from server.main import app; c=TestClient(app); print(c.get('/health').json()); r=c.post('/api/v1/sessions', json={'user_id':'demo_user','training_mode':'LOW','noise_profile':'none'}); print(r.status_code); print(sorted(r.json().keys())); print(c.get('/api/v1/users/demo_user/progress').json())" (passed)
